lines: District-Level Camps from 13 January 2026 to 15 January 2026 are being organized for completing the Bio Authentication of INO and HOI of pending institutes. Plz contact your DNO for further information.
Account number is not required for scholarship disbursement through NSP. Scholarship will be disbursed directly into the aadhaar seeded bank account of the beneficiary.
GOI Gudelines dated March-2021 will be applicable.Applicants can view the guidelines from Scheme Details.
The Punjab students studying in other states will also apply online. No offline form will be accepted.
Portal is open for Institutes and line Departments. Institutes can register on the scholarship
Document Required for freeshipcard are Income certificate,Caste certificate, and Passing Certificate
Send your techincal queries to pms[dot]dsjem[dot]punjab[at]gmail[dot]com
